mapper.select: select * from scheduler_task_info where flow_id = #{flowId} order by create_time asc

select * from scheduler_task_info where split_part(source_route, ':', 1) = 'bizref' and split_part(source_route, ':', 2) = 'v1' and split_part(source_route, ':', 3) = concat('bizSystem=', #{encodedBizSystem}) and split_part(source_route, ':', 4) = concat('bizKey=', #{encodedBizKey})
